stemHtml:
Refer to figure.

The ADF in the aircraft has been tuned to a nearby NDB, which has been identified. The annex shows the accompanying RBI and the direction indicator (DI) in the aircraft, which is correctly aligned with the on-board compass. Ignoring any effects of turn radius, and assuming an appropriate intercept, choose the correct statement from the below.

options.a: To intercept QDR 270°, continue on the present heading and turn left away from the NDB.
options.b: To intercept QDM 315°, continue on the present heading and turn right towards the NDB.
options.c: To intercept QDM 270°, continue on the present heading and turn right towards the NDB.
options.d: To intercept QDR 180°, continue on the present heading and turn left towards the NDB.
